/usr/bin/c++ -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/test_angry_chess.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/test_angry_chess.dir/angry_chess/test_chess_moves.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_angry_chess.dir/angry_chess/test_check_detection.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_angry_chess.dir/angry_chess/test_win_conditions.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_angry_chess.dir/angry_chess/test_fen.cpp.o -o test_angry_chess  ../engine/libengine.a ../games/angry_chess/libangry_chess.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2Maind.a ../engine/libengine.a ../_deps/catch2-build/src/libCatch2d.a
